TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Lalumaang ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 204 buwan, 542 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 214 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 328 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 26%, Bunun 1%, Tayan 1%, Truku 7%, Kebalan 2%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lalumaang hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Lalumaang hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Lalumaang hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lalumaang hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lalumaang hya' ga Hupu. tay 'llaw na Lalumaang hya' ga Paudadan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ lalumaaŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕinʦ~ʨima ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, truku *%, keβalan *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na lalumaaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na lalumaaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na lalumaaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na lalumaaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na lalumaaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ħupu. taj ʔllaw na lalumaaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa pau*a*an. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Lalumaang ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 204 buwan, 542 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 214 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 328 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 26%, Bunun 1%, Tayan 1%, Truku 7%, Kebalan 2%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lalumaang hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Lalumaang hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Lalumaang hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lalumaang hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lalumaang hya' ga Hupu. tay 'llaw na Lalumaang hya' ga Paudadan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ lalumaaŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕinʦ~ʨima ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, truku *%, keβalan *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na lalumaaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na lalumaaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na lalumaaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na lalumaaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na lalumaaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ħupu. taj ʔllaw na lalumaaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa pau*a*an. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
